name: com.maxenceguidez.mxunikit.core
description: Provides a minimal game lifecycle core for a project. It combines a scene bootstrapper that preloads services with a manager that survives into the main scene and runs the actual game initialization. This gives new projects a consistent startup flow without writing lifecycle glue code by hand.

samples.description: Demonstrates the async initialization flow with a concrete MxBootstrapper and MxCoreManager wired across a bootstrap and a game scene.
